title: Living in Boulder Vlog 7 - 23 - 2017: 59.1mi 5:15:30 6,391ft. Up James Canyon to Brainard Lake

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his cycling life in Boulder, recapping a previous day's ride up to James Town and Ward, dealing with a flat tire he couldn't properly fix due to an empty glue tube and a leaky spare, and previewing his upcoming ride up Sunshine Canyon. He also mentions fixing his bike's gears and picking up supplies from the bike shop before heading out.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: loves it, finds it fun and stiff
thinks it's great and treats it well (or tries to)
not ashamed to rest at home instead of making videos right away
used to find it really steep and hard but now enjoys it
